propagateApiKey.title: Propagate API Key to upstream API

enumLabelMap.HEADER: Get API key in headers (with fallback on query parameter 'api-key')
enumLabelMap.BEARER: Get API key in authorization Bearer header (incompatible with APIv2 and OAuth). Requires a gateway 4.12.x or later.
enumLabelMap.QUERY_PARAMETER: Get API key in query parameter. Requires a gateway 4.12.x or later.

enableCustomApiKeyHeader.title: Custom API Key header
enableCustomApiKeyHeader.description: No longer required for gateways 4.12.x and later, where the name set in 'API Key Header' is always applied. Only enable it for gateways older than 4.12.x.
